sections.title: Standard dialogue after watching the recording
Before knowing about the bank robbery

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. Can I deposit my stuff here?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: No. I'm a security guard, not a bank clerk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That wall doesn't look very good.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: No, it doesn't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you going to tell me what happened?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: I could do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, go on!

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Someone smashed the wall when they were robbing the bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Someone's robbed the bank?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But... was anyone hurt? Did they get anything valuable?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Yes, but we were able to get more staff and mend the wall easily enough.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: The Bank has already replaced all the stolen items that belonged to customers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, good... but the bank staff got hurt?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Yes, but the new ones are just as good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not very nice, are you?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: No-one's expecting me to be nice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anyway... So, someone's robbed the bank?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know who did it?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: We are fairly sure we know who the robber was. The security recording was damaged in the attack, but it still shows his face clearly enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've got a security recording?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Yes. Our insurers insisted that we install a magical scrying orb.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see the recording?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: I suppose so. But it's quite long.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's ok, show me the recording.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Alright... The bank's magical playback device will feed the recorded images into your mind. Just shut your eyes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, maybe another day.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So who was the robber?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: I can't disclose that information.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, I'll stop bothering you now.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Good day, [sir/ma'am].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't want anything.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any idea who robbed the bank yet?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: We are fairly sure we know who the robber was. The security recording was damaged in the attack, but it still shows his face clearly enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've got a security recording?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Yes. Our insurers insisted that we install a magical scrying orb.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The robber in the recording looked familiar.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Oh, you recognised him too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, and I can tell you where he lives.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Thanks, but we already know where to find our suspect.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, and he's admitted that he did the robbery!

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: The amount of evidence against him makes that almost unnecessary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So are you going to have him arrested?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: We're certainly keeping an eye on him. I'm afraid I can't give you any more details about the case.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see that recording again, please?

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: I'd like you to pay me 50 gp first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not carrying that much.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Oh well, maybe another day.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: As a bank employee, I suppose I could take the money directly from your bank account.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, you can take 50 gp from my bank account.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, maybe another day.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, here's 50 gp.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, maybe another day.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't want anything.

lines.speaker: Bank guard
lines.text: Ok.
